items.name_en: [New] 👉 Marmont chain macaron series pastel mini bag, comes with a keychain, can be used to attach this bag to another larger bag. Features a structured yet soft shape, flap closure with GG metal accessories. The hardware draws inspiration from 1970s classic designs. Made of quilted human-shaped pattern genuine leather.
items.name_cn:
[New] 👉 Marmont chain macaron series pastel mini bag, comes with a keychain, can be used to attach this bag to another larger bag. Features a structured yet soft shape, flap closure with GG metal accessories. The hardware draws inspiration from 1970s classic designs. Made of quilted human-shaped pattern genuine leather.
Model: 699757.
Dimensions: 16.5(L) x 10.2(W) x 5.1cm(T)
Color: Beige full leather pastel G/Original leather.
Italian creation
Model height: 176cm
Fits iPhone Pro, card holder, and lipstick

items.name_en: [Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
items.name_cn:
[Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
Model: 760196.
Dimensions: 20(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Brown/PVC. (287718)
